texto: To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause enough. But it is a hard quest worth making to find a comrade through whose steady presence one becomes steadily the person one desires to be.
explicacao: Citação de Anna Louise Strong sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “To fall in love is easy, even to remain in it is not difficult; our human loneliness is cause eno…” articula autoestima, love, soul-mate em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como soul-mate.
